CustomField.formula: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE(School_Name__c ,"'","") ,"’","") ,"‘","") ,"/","") ,".","") ,"-","") ,",","") ,"#","") ,"&","") ,")","") ,"(","") ,")","") ,"!","") ,"[","") ,"]","") ,"\"","") ,"“","") ,"”","") ,"=","")
CustomField.label: Normalized School Name
